bio: We, New Genesis, seek to balance opposing forces and maintain harmony within our community. As a reformed and orthodox society, we value stability and prudence in all aspects of life.
name: New_Genesis_171_Reformed_174_Orthodox_180_Reformed_181
ideology:
賢者1:  Stability**

This short name captures the opposing ideas between 賢者1 (中庸), who prioritizes stability and mutual understanding, and 賢者2 (中庸), who emphasizes the need for perfect fairness to maintain the status quo.
